# Pull Request

## What changed?

Describe the change clearly.

## Why?

Explain the problem or improvement.

## Type of change

- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] UI/UX
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Performance

## Checklist

- [ ] I tested Free Board.
- [ ] I tested Kanban.
- [ ] I tested Matrix.
- [ ] I tested Mind Map.
- [ ] I tested Timeline.
- [ ] I tested dark mode.
- [ ] I tested mobile, if applicable.
- [ ] I did not add an unnecessary dependency.
- [ ] I did not break localStorage/import/export.

## Screenshots

Add images if the change is visual.

## Notes

Include risks, pending items, or important decisions.
